content: By 2025, the top-tier active learning agent memory architectures can be repurposed to add an adaptive query gating layer to episodic memory transformer agents, where the active learning framework dynamically prioritizes which episodic memory tokens get full transformer attention based on how much they reduce the agent's prediction uncertainty for its current task. This creates a curious, self-optimizing memory system that only activates high-value episodic traces instead of processing all stored experiences at every step.
